tests.test_name: Analyze button is disabled when no input is provided

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user who has not yet provided any input sees the Analyze button in a disabled state, preventing premature submission.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Analyze button is disabled when no input is provided
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with no input provided

tests.test_name: Analyze button is enabled when test case content is provided

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user uploads a test case fixture file and the Analyze button becomes enabled, signalling readiness to submit.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Analyze button is enabled when test case content is provided
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads the test case fixture 'bdd_sample.feature'

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user uploads a fixture, submits the analysis against a mocked API, and sees documentation rendered in the output panel.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Analyze page is open and the analysis API is mocked
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads 'bdd_sample.feature' and submits the analysis
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Documentation is displayed in the output panel

tests.test_name: Clear button resets input and output

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user who has existing output clears the analysis results, leaving both the test case input box and the output panel empty.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Clear button resets input and output
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: API is mocked and existing output is present in the panel
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The output panel is cleared and the test case input box is empty

tests.test_name: API error shows an error message

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user submits an analysis when the API is mocked to return a 500 error and sees an appropriate error message instead of output.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: API error shows an error message
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: Analyze page is open and the analysis API is mocked to return HTTP 500
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads 'bdd_sample.feature' and submits the analysis
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: An analysis error message is displayed

tests.test_name: Format selection is forwarded in the analysis payload

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user selects a specific format and role, uploads a fixture, and submits; the analysis request payload correctly includes the chosen format.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Format selection is forwarded in the analysis payload
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: API is mocked and the Analyze page is open
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User selects format 'playwright' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'bdd_sample.feature', and submits the analysis
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The analysis request payload includes format 'playwright'

tests.test_name: Testing layer selection is forwarded in the analysis payload

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user selects a testing layer, uploads a fixture, and submits; the analysis request payload correctly includes the chosen testing layer.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Testing layer selection is forwarded in the analysis payload
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: API is mocked and the Analyze page is open
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User selects testing layer 'unit', uploads 'bdd_sample.feature', and submits the analysis
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The analysis request payload includes testing layer 'unit'

tests.test_name: Output panel clears when new content is pasted

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user with existing output in the panel pastes new content into the text box, automatically clearing stale results.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Output panel clears when new content is pasted
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: API is mocked and existing output is present in the panel
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User pastes new content into the text box

tests.test_name: Output panel clears when a new test case file is uploaded

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user with existing output uploads a new test case file, automatically clearing the stale output panel.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Output panel clears when a new test case file is uploaded
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: API is mocked and existing output is present in the panel
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads a new test case file

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user with existing output changes the selected format, automatically clearing the output panel to prevent stale results.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: API is mocked and existing output is present in the panel

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user with existing output changes the selected role, automatically clearing the output panel to prevent stale results.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: API is mocked and existing output is present in the panel

tests.test_name: Changing add-ons selection clears analysis result

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user with existing output selects an add-on ('Technical Review'), automatically clearing the output panel to prevent stale results.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Changing add-ons selection clears analysis result
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: API is mocked and existing output is present in the panel

tests.test_name: Changing data dictionary clears analysis result

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user with existing output changes the data dictionary selection, automatically clearing the output panel to prevent stale results.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Changing data dictionary clears analysis result
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: API is mocked and existing output is present in the panel
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User changes the analysis dictionary selection

tests.test_name: Changing testing layers clears analysis result

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user with existing output selects a testing layer ('unit'), automatically clearing the output panel to prevent stale results.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Changing testing layers clears analysis result
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: API is mocked and existing output is present in the panel

tests.test_name: Test case input persists after navigating away and back

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user uploads a test case fixture, navigates away from the Analyze page, and returns to find their input still populated.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Test case input persists after navigating away and back
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User uploads 'bdd_sample.feature' then navigates away and returns to the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The test case input box is still populated

tests.test_name: Analysis result persists after navigating away and back

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A user with existing analysis output navigates away and returns to the Analyze page, finding their results still visible in the output panel.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Analysis result persists after navigating away and back
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: API is mocked and existing output is present in the panel
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User navigates away from and then returns to the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Documentation is still visible in the output panel

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario to establish a consistent starting state.

tests.journey: A logged-in user with existing analysis output logs out and returns to the Analyze page, finding both the input box and output panel fully cleared.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is logged in, API is mocked, and existing output is present in the panel
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User logs out and returns to the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The test case input box is empty and the output panel is cleared
